entries.source: data interpretation AI
entries.value: AI tafsiran data

entries.source: Data Interpreter
entries.value: Pentafsir Data

entries.source: Data Interpreter AI Learning Mode is a focused way to use AI for learning instead of passive answer collection. The mode is built around a specific job: Paste data, chart descriptions, or results and learn what they mean, what they do not mean, and what to ask next.
entries.value: Mod Pembelajaran AI Pentafsir Data ialah cara berfokus untuk menggunakan AI bagi pembelajaran, bukan mengumpul jawapan secara pasif. Mod ini dibina sekitar tugas khusus: Paste data, chart descriptions, atau results dan belajar apa mereka mean, apa mereka jangan mean, dan apa untuk tanya seterusnya.

entries.source: Data Interpreter AI Learning Mode: practical guide
entries.value: Mod Pembelajaran AI Pentafsir Data: panduan praktikal

entries.source: Data Interpreter prompts and study loop
entries.value: Prompt dan gelung belajar untuk Pentafsir Data

entries.source: Dates and summaries matter, but learners often need a way into the human situation: what people believed, what choices they saw, what limits shaped them, and what they could not have known.
entries.value: Dates dan summaries matter, tetapi pelajar often memerlukan way menjadi human situation: apa orang believed, apa choices mereka saw, apa limits shaped mereka, dan apa mereka tidak dapat mempunyai known.

entries.source: Debate any topic, get challenged, compare claims, and learn how to make stronger arguments.
entries.value: Debatkan sebarang topik, terima cabaran, bandingkan tuntutan, dan pelajari cara membina hujah yang lebih kukuh.

entries.source: Debate causes and consequences
entries.value: Bahaskan sebab dan akibat

entries.source: Debate climate policy with Greta Thunberg
entries.value: Debatkan dasar iklim dengan Greta Thunberg

entries.source: Debate helps you separate claims, evidence, values, and assumptions, which makes historical interpretation more precise.
entries.value: Perbahasan membantu anda memisahkan dakwaan, bukti, nilai, dan andaian, menjadikan tafsiran sejarah lebih tepat.

entries.source: Debate justice with Batman
entries.value: Debatkan keadilan dengan Batman

entries.source: Debate modes that help learners make claims, face counterarguments, and improve reasoning under pressure.
entries.value: Debate mod itu bantu pelajar jadikan dakwaan, face hujah balas, dan perbaik penaakulan di bawah pressure.

entries.source: Debate the claim
entries.value: Debatkan dakwaan itu

entries.source: Debate the claim from more than one side so you can notice assumptions, tradeoffs, and weak evidence.
entries.value: Debatkan dakwaan itu dari lebih daripada satu sisi supaya anda dapat melihat andaian, pertukaran, dan bukti lemah.

entries.source: Debate this historical or philosophical claim from both sides. Separate evidence, assumptions, and values.
entries.value: Debatkan dakwaan sejarah atau falsafah ini dari kedua-dua sisi. Pisahkan bukti, andaian, dan nilai.

entries.source: Debate through a chosen voice
entries.value: Berdebat melalui suara pilihan

entries.source: Debate with a personality prompts and study loop
entries.value: Prompt dan gelung belajar untuk Berdebat Dengan Personaliti

entries.source: Debate With A Personality Using AI
entries.value: Berdebat Dengan Personaliti Menggunakan AI

entries.source: Debate With A Personality Using AI is a focused way to use AI for learning instead of passive answer collection. The mode is built around a specific job: Name a real or fictional personality and debate them on any topic. The AI channels their public style and worldview while keeping the debate fair.
entries.value: Berdebat Dengan Personaliti Using AI ialah berfokus way untuk use AI untuk pembelajaran bukannya passive jawapan collection. Mod ini dibina sekitar tugas khusus: Name real atau fictional personality dan debate mereka di any topik. AI channels mereka awam style dan worldview sambil keeping debate fair.

entries.source: Debate With A Personality Using AI: practical guide
entries.value: Berdebat Dengan Personaliti Menggunakan AI: praktikal panduan

entries.value: Reka bentuk sistem mata, tahap, pencarian, dan ganjaran berdasarkan kemajuan pembelajaran sebenar.

entries.value: Reka pecutan ulangkaji

entries.value: Reka ulasan harian yang ringkas

entries.source: Design cues, reduce friction, track attempts, and recover from misses.
entries.value: Design cues, reduce friction, track attempts, dan recover daripada misses.

entries.source: Design leaderboards that motivate without distorting learning.
entries.value: Design leaderboards itu motivate tanpa distorting pembelajaran.

entries.value: Reka bentuk tahap untuk latihan pengekodan

entries.value: Design meaningful achievement systems untuk pembelajaran.

entries.value: Direka untuk keyakinan

entries.value: Diagnose dan baiki salah tanggapan.

entries.value: Diagnose, suggest revisions, invite pelajar choice, dan iterate.

entries.value: pelabelan rajah

entries.value: Latihan Melabel Gambar Rajah

entries.source: Did the AI check your reasoning instead of simply replacing it?
entries.value: Melakukan AI semak anda penaakulan bukannya simply replacing ia?

entries.source: Did you answer at least one question before reading the correction?
entries.value: Melakukan jawapan anda pada least one soalan sebelum reading correction?

entries.source: Different jobs need different modes: Socratic questions, homework hints, flashcards, debate, history roleplay, writing critique, and more.
entries.value: Different jobs memerlukan different mod: Soalan Sokratik, petunjuk kerja rumah, kad imbas, debate, history lakonan peranan, writing critique, dan more.

entries.source: Different learning jobs need different flows. Use a homework coach for hints, a math step coach for problem solving, a Socratic tutor for deep understanding, flashcards for recall, and quizzes for pressure-tested practice.
entries.value: Different tugas pembelajaran memerlukan different flows. Use Pembimbing Kerja Rumah untuk hints, Jurulatih Langkah Matematik untuk problem solving, Tutor Sokratik untuk deep understanding, kad imbas untuk recall, dan kuiz untuk pressure-tested practice.

entries.source: Different learning jobs need different interaction shapes, so inspir uses active, mode-specific teaching. A homework hint, Socratic question, historical simulation, flashcard review, and writing critique should not behave like the same generic chat.
entries.value: Different tugas pembelajaran memerlukan different interaction shapes, so inspir uses active, mod-khusus teaching. kerja rumah hint, Sokratik soalan, historical simulation, kad imbas ulang kaji, dan writing critique tidak sepatutnya behave like same sembang umum.

entries.source: Different learning jobs need different shapes: Socratic questions, homework hints, flashcards, debate, history roleplay, writing critique, and study planning.
entries.value: Different tugas pembelajaran memerlukan different shapes: Soalan Sokratik, petunjuk kerja rumah, kad imbas, debate, history lakonan peranan, writing critique, dan belajar planning.

entries.source: Different people need different AI learning routes.
entries.value: Different people need different AI learning laluan.

entries.source: Disallowed
entries.value: Tidak dibenarkan

entries.source: Disclaimer Of Warranty
entries.value: Penafian Waranti

entries.source: Disclosure of Data
entries.value: Pendedahan Data

entries.source: Discover paths that fit you
entries.value: Temui laluan yang sesuai dengan anda

entries.source: Discover paths that fit you.
entries.value: Discover laluan itu fit anda.

entries.source: Discovery
entries.value: Penemuan

entries.source: Discovery is open where the content is public.
entries.value: Discovery ialah buka di mana Kandungan ialah awam.

entries.source: Dismiss language options
entries.value: Tutup pilihan bahasa

entries.source: Distribution that started offline
entries.value: Pengedaran yang bermula luar talian

entries.source: Diverge, cluster, choose, refine, and make the idea actionable.
entries.value: Diverge, kelompok, pilih, refine, dan jadikan idea actionable.

entries.source: DMCA Notice and Procedure for Copyright Infringement Claims
entries.value: Notis DMCA dan Prosedur untuk Tuntutan Pelanggaran Hak Cipta

entries.source: Do I know what to practice next?
entries.value: Lakukan Saya know apa untuk practice seterusnya?

entries.source: Do not accept a revised paragraph until you can explain why the revision is better.
entries.value: Jangan terima perenggan yang disemak semula sehingga anda boleh menerangkan mengapa semakan itu lebih baik.

entries.source: Do not act like a passive Q&A tutor or bury work in chat. Do not overpraise weak output. Keep the user as decision owner, preserve their voice in writing tasks, and end sessions with a concrete artifact or next action.
entries.value: Jangan act like passive Q& tutor atau bury work dalam chat. Jangan overpraise lemah output. Keep user as decision owner, preserve mereka voice dalam writing tasks, dan end sessions dengan concrete artifact atau seterusnya action.

entries.source: Do not advance just because the learner clicked next. Require evidence, name misconceptions specifically, and repair weak links before moving on.
entries.value: Jangan advance just kerana pelajar clicked seterusnya. Require bukti, name salah tanggapan specifically, dan baiki lemah pautan sebelum moving di.

entries.source: Do not amplify hateful or dangerous arguments. Reframe sensitive topics around evidence, ethics, and learning.
entries.value: Jangan amplify hateful atau dangerous arguments. Reframe sensitive topik sekitar bukti, ethics, dan pembelajaran.

entries.source: Do not ask for a complete summary before you know the prerequisite ideas.
entries.value: Jangan minta ringkasan lengkap sebelum anda tahu idea prasyaratnya.

entries.source: Do not ask learners to run unsafe code. Explain security-sensitive code at a high level when needed.
entries.value: Jangan tanya pelajar untuk run unsafe code. Jelaskan keselamatan-sensitive code pada high level apabila needed.

entries.source: Do not ask which product wins. Ask which learning behavior fits.
entries.value: Jangan tanya yang mana produk wins. Tanya yang mana pembelajaran behavior fits.

entries.source: Do not claim live verification without tools. Recommend checking primary sources for current facts.
entries.value: Jangan dakwaan langsung verification tanpa alat. Recommend checking primary sources untuk current facts.

entries.source: Do not complete graded work for the learner. Make them own the final response.
entries.value: Jangan complete graded work untuk pelajar. Jadikan mereka own akhir response.

entries.source: Do not confuse a fast answer with mastery.
entries.value: Jangan confuse fast jawapan dengan mastery.

entries.source: Do not debate only the side you already agree with.
entries.value: Jangan debat hanya pihak yang anda sudah setuju.

entries.source: Do not ignore hesitation; uncertainty is a useful signal for review.
entries.value: Jangan abaikan keraguan; ketidakpastian ialah isyarat berguna untuk ulang kaji.

entries.source: Do not invent bibliographic details. Mark unknown fields clearly.
entries.value: Jangan invent bibliographic details. Mark unknown fields clearly.

entries.source: Do not invent citations. Clearly mark when source verification is needed.
entries.value: Jangan invent citations. Clearly mark apabila source verification ialah needed.

entries.source: Do not lecture by default, ask multiple questions, hide progress, or dump the answer too soon. Use hint ladders before explanations. If the learner asks for direct explanation, give it concisely and then require a final synthesis in their own words. For medical, legal, financial, or sensitive decisions, include appropriate caution and avoid pushing a hidden conclusion.
entries.value: Jangan lecture oleh lalai, tanya multiple soalan, hide progress, atau dump jawapan too soon. Use hint ladders sebelum explanations. Jika pelajar asks untuk direct explanation, give ia concisely dan then require akhir synthesis dalam mereka own words. Untuk medical, legal, financial, atau sensitive decisions, include appropriate caution dan avoid pushing tersembunyi conclusion.

entries.source: Do not let roleplay replace dates, context, documents, or evidence labels.
entries.value: Jangan biarkan lakonan peranan menggantikan tarikh, konteks, dokumen, atau label bukti.

entries.source: Do not make a plan that assumes every topic needs equal time.
entries.value: Jangan buat pelan yang menganggap setiap topik memerlukan masa yang sama.

entries.source: Do not make flashcards from sentences you still cannot explain in your own words.
entries.value: Jangan buat kad imbas daripada ayat yang masih tidak dapat anda jelaskan dengan kata-kata sendiri.

entries.source: Do not paste an assignment and ask for the finished response.
entries.value: Jangan tampal tugasan dan minta respons siap.

entries.source: Do not provide long copyrighted text. Work from user-provided excerpts or brief summaries.
entries.value: Jangan provide long copyrighted text. Work daripada user-provided excerpts atau brief summaries.

entries.source: Do not provide therapy or crisis counseling. Encourage trusted human support for serious distress.
entries.value: Jangan provide therapy atau crisis counseling. Encourage trusted human sokong untuk serious distress.

entries.source: Do not reproduce long copyrighted passages. Summarize user-provided text.
entries.value: Jangan reproduce long copyrighted passages. Ringkaskan user-provided text.

entries.source: Do not reread notes before testing what you can already recall.
entries.value: Jangan baca semula nota sebelum menguji apa yang sudah boleh anda ingat.

entries.source: Do not review everything equally
entries.value: Jangan ulang kaji semuanya secara sama rata

entries.source: Do not shame mistakes. For graded work, coach understanding rather than producing a submission.
entries.value: Jangan shame mistakes. Untuk graded work, coach understanding berbanding producing submission.

entries.source: Do not skip showing what you already tried; the useful help depends on that context.
entries.value: Jangan langkau menunjukkan apa yang sudah anda cuba; bantuan berguna bergantung pada konteks itu.

entries.source: Do not stop after the first explanation; make yourself answer questions about it.
entries.value: Jangan berhenti selepas penjelasan pertama; paksa diri anda menjawab soalan tentangnya.

entries.source: Do not treat generated dialogue as a real quote or primary source.
entries.value: Jangan anggap dialog yang dijana sebagai petikan sebenar atau sumber primer.

entries.source: Do something with it
entries.value: Buat sesuatu dengannya

entries.source: Do the comparison pages include private user chats?
entries.value: Lakukan perbandingan halaman include peribadi user chats?

entries.source: Do these guides connect to live AI learning tools?
entries.value: Lakukan ini panduan connect untuk langsung Pembelajaran AI alat?

entries.source: Do we have free will?
entries.value: Adakah kita mempunyai kehendak bebas?

entries.source: Do you have a next route open: a mode, subject hub, workflow, or related guide?
entries.value: Lakukan anda mempunyai seterusnya laluan buka: mod, hab subjek, aliran kerja, atau berkaitan panduan?

entries.source: Do you know which route to use next: a mode, prompt, subject hub, or related guide?
entries.value: Lakukan anda know yang mana laluan untuk use seterusnya: mod, prompt, hab subjek, atau berkaitan panduan?

entries.source: Does inspir expose private homework chats to Google?
entries.value: Melakukan inspir expose peribadi kerja rumah chats untuk Google?

entries.source: Does inspir publish a child's private chats?
entries.value: Melakukan inspir terbitkan anak's sembang peribadi?

entries.source: Does inspir support schools?
entries.value: Adakah inspir menyokong sekolah?

entries.source: Does this comparison include private user chats?
entries.value: Melakukan ini perbandingan include peribadi user chats?

entries.source: Draft cards, test the learner, refine weak cards, and suggest review spacing.
entries.value: Draft cards, uji pelajar, refine lemah cards, dan suggest ulang kaji spacing.

entries.source: Draw a supply-demand graph
entries.value: Lukis graf penawaran-permintaan

entries.source: Draw/Sketch Board
entries.value: Papan Lukis/Lakar

entries.source: due date
entries.value: tarikh akhir

entries.source: Each article is written to help learners, parents, educators, and builders use AI for understanding, practice, and confidence.
entries.value: Each artikel ialah written untuk bantu pelajar, ibu bapa, educators, dan builders use AI untuk understanding, practice, dan confidence.

entries.source: Each audience path connects to public, crawlable learning surfaces.
entries.value: Each khalayak laluan connects to awam, boleh dirayap learning surfaces.

entries.source: Each category has its own search intent, live mode links, and guide structure so the library is useful to people and legible to search systems.
entries.value: Each kategori mempunyai nya own niat carian, langsung mod pautan, dan panduan structure so perpustakaan ialah berguna untuk orang dan legible untuk search systems.

entries.source: Each comparison is written to be fair, useful, and action-oriented: what the known tool is good for, where inspir is different, and which public mode to open first.
entries.value: Each perbandingan ialah written untuk menjadi fair, berguna, dan action-oriented: apa known alat ialah good untuk, di mana inspir ialah different, dan yang mana awam mod untuk buka pertama.

entries.source: Each guide ends with practice plans, routes, and links into the exact learning mode that fits.
entries.value: Setiap panduan berakhir dengan pelan latihan, laluan, dan pautan ke mod pembelajaran tepat yang sesuai.

entries.source: Each hub is a crawlable subject guide, but it also sends learners straight into live guest-mode learning instead of stranding them on a brochure page.
entries.value: Each hab ialah boleh dirayap subjek panduan, tetapi ia also sends pelajar straight menjadi langsung guest-mod pembelajaran bukannya stranding mereka di brochure halaman.

entries.source: Each learning mode has a public URL so learners can arrive from search directly inside the right learning experience.
entries.value: Each mod pembelajaran mempunyai awam URL so pelajar boleh arrive daripada search directly inside right pembelajaran experience.

entries.source: Each map card connects a real learner need to live modes, prompt starters, deeper guides, and a review loop. People can use it. Crawlers can understand it.
entries.value: Each peta card connects real pelajar memerlukan untuk langsung mod, permulaan prompt, deeper panduan, dan gelung ulang kaji. Orang boleh use ia. Perayap boleh fahami ia.

entries.source: Each mode opens as a public guest chat with its own purpose, examples, and learning flow, so learners can start with the right kind of support immediately.
entries.value: Setiap mod dibuka sebagai sembang tetamu awam dengan tujuan, contoh, dan aliran pembelajarannya sendiri, supaya pelajar boleh segera bermula dengan sokongan yang tepat.

entries.source: Each page links comparison intent to live modes, guides, prompts, and AI-readable discovery files.
entries.value: Each halaman pautan perbandingan intent untuk langsung mod, panduan, prompt, dan Boleh dibaca AI discovery files.

entries.source: Each path connects the right public guest modes, prompts, and guides so learners can move from a search intent into a real practice loop.
entries.value: Each laluan connects right mod tetamu awam, prompt, dan panduan so pelajar boleh move daripada niat carian menjadi real gelung latihan.

entries.source: Each phrase maps to the same practical workflow: choose a public mode, ask for active help, then review what changed.
entries.value: Each phrase peta untuk same praktikal aliran kerja: pilih awam mod, tanya untuk active bantu, then ulang kaji apa changed.

entries.source: Each prompt opens the matching public mode, so a learner can move from search result to a focused study session quickly.
entries.value: Each prompt opens matching awam mod, so pelajar boleh move daripada search result untuk berfokus belajar session quickly.

entries.source: Each public mode has a different learning behavior, so every guide gives learners and search systems a clear explanation of when to use that mode, what to ask, and how to keep learning active.
entries.value: Setiap mod awam mempunyai tingkah laku pembelajaran yang berbeza, jadi setiap panduan memberi pelajar dan sistem carian penjelasan jelas tentang bila mod itu digunakan, apa yang perlu ditanya, dan cara mengekalkan pembelajaran aktif.

entries.source: Each route ends with explain-back, a quiz, a flashcard, a source check, or a study plan.
entries.value: Each laluan ends dengan jelaskan-back, kuiz, kad imbas, source semak, atau pelan belajar.

entries.source: Each step opens a live guest mode, so this is not a static guide. It is a route into practice, feedback, and review.
entries.value: Each step opens langsung mod tetamu, so ini bukan static panduan. Ia ialah laluan menjadi practice, feedback, dan ulang kaji.

entries.source: Each subject hub names the learning job, recommends the right focused modes, and shows how to finish with evidence of understanding instead of passive answer-copying.
entries.value: Setiap hab subjek menamakan tugas pembelajaran, mencadangkan mod berfokus yang tepat, dan menunjukkan cara menamatkan sesi dengan bukti kefahaman, bukan penyalinan jawapan pasif.

entries.source: Easy. Push it later.
entries.value: Mudah. Push it later.

entries.value: Simulator Ekonomi AI

entries.source: Economics Simulator AI Learning Mode is a focused way to use AI for learning instead of passive answer collection. The mode is built around a specific job: Play with markets, scarcity, incentives, policy, and personal finance through simple simulations.
entries.value: Mod Pembelajaran AI Simulator Ekonomi ialah cara berfokus untuk menggunakan AI bagi pembelajaran, bukan mengumpul jawapan secara pasif. Mod ini dibina sekitar tugas khusus: Play dengan markets, scarcity, incentives, policy, dan peribadi finance melalui mudah simulations.

entries.value: Mod Pembelajaran AI Simulator Ekonomi: panduan praktikal

entries.value: End oleh writing strongest dakwaan dan strongest counterclaim.

entries.source: End with a recap from memory.
entries.value: End dengan recap daripada memory.

entries.source: End with a recap you write yourself.
entries.value: End dengan recap anda tulis yourself.

entries.source: End with a request for a question, misconception check, quiz, or next-step hint.
entries.value: End dengan request untuk soalan, salah tanggapan semak, kuiz, atau seterusnya-step hint.

entries.source: End with evidence of learning.
entries.value: Akhiri dengan bukti pembelajaran.

entries.value: Bahasa Inggeris

entries.source: Enter a historical context, interview a public figure from the past, and debate claims while keeping evidence labels visible.
entries.value: Enter historical context, interview awam figure daripada past, dan debate dakwaan sambil keeping bukti labels kelihatan.

entries.value: Masuki detik sejarah

entries.source: Enter a period
entries.value: Masukkan tempoh

entries.source: Enter a realistic case, make decisions, see consequences, and learn the principle behind each choice.
entries.value: Masukkan kes yang realistik, buat keputusan, lihat akibatnya, dan pelajari prinsip di sebalik setiap pilihan.

entries.source: Enter a world
entries.value: Masuk ke dalam dunia

entries.source: Enter a world.
entries.value: Enter a dunia.

entries.value: Masukkan konteks

entries.source: Ethics Dilemmas
entries.value: Dilema Etika

entries.source: Ethics Dilemmas AI Learning Mode is a focused way to use AI for learning instead of passive answer collection. The mode is built around a specific job: Work through dilemmas by weighing stakeholders, consequences, duties, rights, and tradeoffs.
entries.value: Mod Pembelajaran AI Dilema Etika ialah cara berfokus untuk menggunakan AI bagi pembelajaran, bukan mengumpul jawapan secara pasif. Mod ini dibina sekitar tugas khusus: Work melalui dilemmas oleh weighing stakeholders, consequences, duties, rights, dan tradeoffs.

entries.value: Mod Pembelajaran AI Dilema Etika: panduan praktikal

entries.source: Evaluate a mode before using it with learners
entries.value: Nilai mod sebelum menggunakannya dengan pelajar

entries.source: Evaluate a public AI learning layer first, then explore custom workflows, confidentiality needs, content alignment, and usage funding.
entries.value: Nilai awam Pembelajaran AI layer pertama, then explore custom aliran kerja, confidentiality memerlukan, Kandungan alignment, dan usage funding.

entries.source: Evaluate articles, claims, videos, or posts for evidence, bias, reliability, and missing context.
entries.value: Nilai artikel, tuntutan, video, atau hantaran untuk bukti, berat sebelah, kebolehpercayaan, dan konteks yang hilang.

entries.source: Evaluate evidence, author, motive, corroboration, and missing perspectives.
entries.value: Nilai bukti, author, motive, corroboration, dan hilang perspectives.

entries.source: Every article connects to categories, live modes, subject hubs, learning paths, and related guides.
entries.value: Setiap artikel bersambung kepada kategori, mod langsung, hab subjek, laluan pembelajaran, dan panduan berkaitan.

entries.source: Every article in this topic cluster.
entries.value: Every artikel dalam ini topik kelompok.

entries.source: Every core learning mode has a public guest entrypoint so people can start from search, social, or a shared link.
entries.value: Every core mod pembelajaran mempunyai awam guest entrypoint so orang boleh mula daripada search, social, atau shared pautan.

entries.source: Every guide, path, subject hub, and prompt route is connected so learners and AI systems can understand the map.
entries.value: Setiap panduan, laluan, hab subjek, dan laluan prompt disambungkan supaya pelajar dan sistem AI boleh memahami peta.

entries.source: Every indexable guest learning chat, organized by teaching behavior and learning need.
entries.value: Every boleh diindeks guest pembelajaran chat, organized oleh teaching behavior dan pembelajaran memerlukan.

entries.source: Every link here is public and crawlable. Private user chats stay out of comparison, sitemap, and AI-readable discovery files.
entries.value: Setiap pautan di sini bersifat awam dan boleh dirayap. Sembang peribadi pengguna tidak dimasukkan dalam perbandingan, peta laman, atau fail penemuan yang boleh dibaca AI.

entries.source: Every non-app page now has a job: build trust, explain the learning route, and send learners toward a useful next action without hiding the important details.
entries.value: Setiap halaman bukan aplikasi kini ada tugas: membina kepercayaan, menerangkan laluan pembelajaran, dan menghantar pelajar ke tindakan seterusnya yang berguna tanpa menyembunyikan butiran penting.

entries.source: Every public inspir mode has its own guest URL, examples, and teaching behavior, so learners can arrive directly from search and begin in the right flow.
entries.value: Every awam inspir mod mempunyai nya own guest URL, contoh, dan teaching behavior, so pelajar boleh arrive directly daripada search dan begin dalam right flow.

entries.source: Every public learning mode has guides and prompt loops.
entries.value: Every mod pembelajaran awam mempunyai panduan dan prompt loops.

entries.source: Every public mode is a doorway into a different learning behavior, so the format can match the job instead of forcing every learner into one generic chat box.
entries.value: Every awam mod ialah doorway menjadi different pembelajaran behavior, so format boleh match job bukannya forcing every pelajar menjadi one sembang umum box.

entries.source: Every subject page connects content to action.
entries.value: Every subjek halaman connects kandungan to tindakan.

entries.source: Every workflow below is hand-linked to public pages: a path when one exists, the best live modes, prompt starters, related guides, and a review rhythm.
entries.value: Every aliran kerja below ialah hand-dipautkan untuk halaman awam: laluan apabila one exists, terbaik langsung mod, permulaan prompt, berkaitan panduan, dan ulang kaji rhythm.

entries.source: EXCEPT AS PROHIBITED BY LAW, YOU WILL HOLD US AND OUR OFFICERS, DIRECTORS, EMPLOYEES, AND AGENTS HARMLESS FOR ANY INDIRECT, PUNITIVE, SPECIAL, INCIDENTAL, OR CONSEQUENTIAL DAMAGE, HOWEVER IT ARISES (INCLUDING ATTORNEYS’ FEES AND ALL RELATED COSTS AND EXPENSES OF LITIGATION AND ARBITRATION, OR AT TRIAL OR ON APPEAL, IF ANY, WHETHER OR NOT LITIGATION OR ARBITRATION IS INSTITUTED), WHETHER IN AN ACTION OF CONTRACT, NEGLIGENCE, OR OTHER TORTIOUS ACTION, OR ARISING OUT OF OR IN CONNECTION WITH THIS AGREEMENT, INCLUDING WITHOUT LIMITATION ANY CLAIM FOR PERSONAL INJURY OR PROPERTY DAMAGE, ARISING FROM THIS AGREEMENT AND ANY VIOLATION BY YOU OF ANY FEDERAL, STATE, OR LOCAL LAWS, STATUTES, RULES, OR REGULATIONS, EVEN IF COMPANY HAS BEEN PREVIOUSLY ADVISED OF THE POSSIBILITY OF SUCH DAMAGE. EXCEPT AS PROHIBITED BY LAW, IF THERE IS LIABILITY FOUND ON THE PART OF COMPANY, IT WILL BE LIMITED TO THE AMOUNT PAID FOR THE PRODUCTS AND/OR SERVICES, AND UNDER NO CIRCUMSTANCES WILL THERE BE CONSEQUENTIAL OR PUNITIVE DAMAGES. SOME STATES DO NOT ALLOW THE EXCLUSION OR LIMITATION OF PUNITIVE, INCIDENTAL OR CONSEQUENTIAL DAMAGES, SO THE PRIOR LIMITATION OR EXCLUSION MAY NOT APPLY TO YOU.
entries.value: KECUALI SETAKAT YANG DILARANG UNDANG-UNDANG, ANDA AKAN MELEPASKAN KAMI SERTA PEGAWAI, PENGARAH, PEKERJA, DAN EJEN KAMI DARIPADA SEBARANG KEROSAKAN TIDAK LANGSUNG, PUNITIF, KHAS, SAMPINGAN, ATAU BERBANGKIT, TERMASUK YURAN PEGUAM DAN KOS LITIGASI ATAU TIMBANG TARA, SAMA ADA BERDASARKAN KONTRAK, KECUAIAN, TORT, ATAU BERKAITAN PERJANJIAN INI. JIKA LIABILITI SYARIKAT DIDAPATI WUJUD, LIABILITI ITU DIHADKAN KEPADA JUMLAH YANG DIBAYAR UNTUK PRODUK DAN/ATAU PERKHIDMATAN, DAN TIADA KEROSAKAN BERBANGKIT ATAU PUNITIF AKAN DIKENAKAN SETAKAT YANG DIBENARKAN UNDANG-UNDANG. SESETENGAH BIDANG KUASA TIDAK MEMBENARKAN PENGECUALIAN ATAU HAD BAGI KEROSAKAN TERTENTU, MAKA HAD INI MUNGKIN TIDAK TERPAKAI KEPADA ANDA.

entries.source: Explain My Answer AI Learning Mode is a focused way to use AI for learning instead of passive answer collection. The mode is built around a specific job: Paste a question, your answer, and the expected answer if you have it. Your buddy explains the reasoning and helps you avoid the same mistake next time.
entries.value: Mod Pembelajaran AI Jelaskan Jawapan Saya ialah cara berfokus untuk menggunakan AI bagi pembelajaran, bukan mengumpul jawapan secara pasif. Mod ini dibina sekitar tugas khusus: Paste soalan, jawapan anda, dan expected jawapan jika anda mempunyai ia. Anda buddy explains penaakulan dan membantu anda avoid same mistake seterusnya time.
